structurePatterns: Checked = flat ink-primary (#262626) fill + white checkmark — NOT blue
Mixed state = ink-primary line inside box
Disabled = quaternary ink (#C4C4C4) border, label at ink-tertiary
Label = body text (14px) to the right, 8px gap (--space-2)
usageHints: Active/checked state is INK, not blue — blue only for focus ring
Use mixed/indeterminate for tree nodes with partial selection
Do not use checkboxes for single-choice — use radio buttons
doNotInvent: Blue fill on checked state — checkmark = ink-primary
Animated transitions beyond standard Aham easing
unknowns: Inline vs block label layout for long labels
